entry.title: Atom Test Entry: Rich HTML content
entry.content:
This is a test entry from the Atom feed fixture. It exercises different HTML content than the RSS feed.

A subheading

Some text under the subheading, with a link and an image below.

A blockquote to test how quoted text renders in the email template.

Final paragraph after the blockquote.
entry.summary: A test entry with rich HTML content including headings, images, and blockquotes.

entry.title: Atom Test Entry: Code and preformatted text
entry.content:
This entry tests code formatting in emails:

const greeting = "Hello from feedmail";
console.log(greeting);

Inline code also works: npm run dev starts the local server.
entry.summary: A test entry with code blocks and preformatted text.
